comments.author: @GlobalCountryExplorer
comments.text: Lebanon is such a resilient and culturally rich nation. It’s heartening to see the beauty and vibrant life behind the headlines. A truly eye-opening look at a deeply complex and misunderstood place.

comments.author: @GlobalRealLifeDocumentary
comments.text: Lebanon has thousands of years of history packed into one small country—from ancient ruins and breathtaking mountains to world-famous cuisine and a vibrant culture. 🇱🇧 After watching this documentary, what surprised you the most about Lebanon, and do you think it's one of the Middle East's most underrated destinations? Why?
